task_completion.description: AstroImageJ is launched and the time-series image stack is loaded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: AstroImageJ main window is open, and an image window is visible displaying a stack (indicated by a scrollbar at the bottom for 40 slices) loaded from ~/AstroImages/time_series_stack/.

task_completion.description: An Average Intensity projection is created and saved as average_map.fits.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'ZProject' window showing 'Average Intensity' or a save dialog/file manager showing 'average_map.fits' being saved to the ~/AstroImages/cv_output/ directory.

task_completion.description: A Standard Deviation projection is created and saved as std_map.fits.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'ZProject' window showing 'Standard Deviation' or a save dialog/file manager showing 'std_map.fits' being saved to the ~/AstroImages/cv_output/ directory.

task_completion.description: The CV map is calculated by dividing the Standard Deviation map by the Average Intensity map as a 32-bit float.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Image Calculator' dialog is visible, showing Image1 (std_map) divided by Image2 (average_map), with the '32-bit (float) result' option checked.

task_completion.description: The resulting CV map is saved to cv_map.fits.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or file explorer window showing 'cv_map.fits' being saved in the ~/AstroImages/cv_output/ directory.

task_completion.description: The global mean and maximum pixel values of the CV map are recorded in cv_statistics.txt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window showing the contents of 'cv_statistics.txt' with the format 'mean_cv: <value>' and 'max_cv: <value>'. The values should be approximately 0.1131 and 2.2394 respectively.

integrity.description: The agent used the AstroImageJ GUI to perform the projections and calculations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show AstroImageJ menus, Z-project dialogs, and Image Calculator dialogs being used, rather than a terminal window running a Python script to bypass the application.

integrity.description: The agent actually measured the statistics of the CV map in AstroImageJ.
integrity.visual_evidence: AstroImageJ 'Results', 'Histogram', or 'Measure' windows should be visible displaying the mean and max values of the generated CV map before they are typed into the text file.

integrity.description: The output files are genuinely created and placed in the correct directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: File manager or terminal 'ls' commands should show the actual .fits files existing in /home/ga/AstroImages/cv_output, not just empty files created via 'touch'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input image stack is located at /home/ga/AstroImages/time_series_stack. The output directory is /home/ga/AstroImages/cv_output. The ground truth Coefficient of Variation (CV) map has a global mean CV of approximately 0.1131 and a global max CV of approximately 2.2394. Verify that the agent records values very close to these in cv_statistics.txt.
